name: Deep Night Runner
short_description: Deep night runner is a game for fans of the runner genre that will allow you to enjoy the gameplay endlessly! Run through the night plains, dodge ghosts and collect coins on your way
detailed_description:
Deep night runner is a game for fans of the runner genre that will allow you to enjoy the gameplay endlessly! Run through the night plains, dodge ghosts and collect coins on your way. Keep in mind, the further you get, the more difficult the game will become, adapting to your skill. What points record can you break?


Peculiarities:
- Nice graphics
- Nice soundtrack
about_the_game:
Deep night runner is a game for fans of the runner genre that will allow you to enjoy the gameplay endlessly! Run through the night plains, dodge ghosts and collect coins on your way. Keep in mind, the further you get, the more difficult the game will become, adapting to your skill. What points record can you break?


Peculiarities:
- Nice graphics
- Nice soundtrack
